title: centaurea paniculata subsp. lunensis
intro: Centaurea paniculata subsp. lunensis, also known as the Moon Centaury, is a perennial plant in the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea paniculata subsp. lunensis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the leaves and flowers and infusing them in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
